falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaks the August 2024 bottom pattern structure; that bottom saw lower highs and failed rallies capped below prior resistance. Clearing 5,600 invalidates the analog and suggests accumulation phase already complete, not bottoming process

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Blowoff score of 41 implies residual fear/uncertainty typical of bottoming. Sustained VIX compression below 14 would indicate complacency return, inconsistent with bottom formation and more consistent with pre-correction market top

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.85% and DXY simultaneously breaks above 104.50
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: August 2024 bottom featured rates/yields falling with dollar weakening (flight to quality in Treasuries, not USD). This combination would signal a different macro regime—likely recession panic or safe-haven bid—breaking the pattern's interest rate/dollar dynamics

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
